subject: [PATCH 8/8] mm: use zone lock guard in __offline_isolated_pages()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: The patch author posted the original patch with a suggested-by credit to Steven Rostedt and a signed-off-by line for themselves. The patch introduces a zone lock guard in __offline_isolated_pages() to replace explicit lock/unlock patterns.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: This patch series replaces explicit lock/unlock patterns in the mm/page_alloc.c file with automatic scope-based cleanup using zone_lock_irqsave. The first message introduces this change to the __offline_isolated_pages() function, which is used for offline memory sections.
